short: A single server in a cluster, often holding several GPUs that do the actual computation.
definition: A compute node is one server within a larger cluster that performs computational work. In AI, a node commonly holds multiple GPUs (often eight), CPUs, fast accelerator memory, intra-node links such as NVLink, and high-speed network adapters for talking to other nodes. Distributed training frameworks split work across many nodes using data, tensor, or pipeline parallelism, communicating over the cluster's network.
